calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On May 1, 2003
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: F. Dias/Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff: Calence, Inc. present by counsel, Amy Alder.
The Court hears evidence and declaration in support of the plaintiff's default prove up hearing.
The Court grants default judgment as follows: In favor of plaintiff against the defendant.
Principal in the amount of $84,619.00
Costs in the amount of $400.00
Total judgment of $85,019.00
Judgment signed in open court.
